text.title: Requirements Prioritization Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.fix: Enforce target ratios (Must ≤ 40%, Should ≈ 20%, Could ≈ 20%, Won't ≈ 20%); flag deviations.
Force confidence to one of [10, 50, 80, 100]; reject 100 unless evidence is attached.

antipattern.symptom: Scores exist but no per-requirement rationale.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treats prioritisation as numeric output only.
antipattern.fix: Require rationale text per requirement; minimum 30 chars.
